title: Breezy's Trial Indicators
description: A pack that changes the trial spawner and vault to have unique indicators, based on their blockstates!
body:
Eversince i've first seen the trial spawner, i saw it's blockstates and looked at it's tiny little orange thingamagigs. My brain was like "hold on, why just stop at orange and gray?"

So......
I made...

**Breezy's**
![Trial Indicators](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e243676ee2958be27823f26edcdde746054bbb8.png)

The pack changes the trial spawner and vault's tiny little.. lights? Crystals? whatever the heck they are into something that may help you identify their states
They change color based on their states.

I really just made this pack just for the lights
It could be used in sum sorta technical way if u ever plan on working with trial spawners
(as it's not really _as_ clear when changing states)

(most of the pack is made via blockstates and models for anybody who asks)

So i really hope this helps anyone who needs it!

_-Brzy_
